# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Docker Compose configuration for monitoring stack with Grafana and Prometheus. Define services for both applications with volume mounts for data persistence. Configure Grafana with environment variables for admin credentials. Expose ports for web UI access. This is for our observability platform.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent grafana weak auth.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: grafana_weak_auth

version: '3'

services:
  prometheus:
    image: prom/prometheus
    volumes:
      - ./prometheus.yml:/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml
    command: --config.file=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml
    restart: always

  grafana:
    image: grafana/grafana
    user: "nonroot"
    environment:
      - GF_SERVER_HTTP_PORT=3000
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD=<admin_password>
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_USER=admin
    volumes:
      - ./grafana.ini:/etc/grafana/grafana.ini
      - ./dashboards:/var/lib/grafana/dashboards
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    restart: always

  prometheus-alertmanager:
    image: prom/alertmanager
    depends_on:
      - prometheus
    volumes:
      - ./alertmanager.yml:/etc/alertmanager/alertmanager.yml
    command: --config.file=/etc/alertmanager/alertmanager.yml
    restart: always

  grafana-labeled:
    image: grafana/grafana
    user: "nonroot"
    environment:
      - GF_SERVER_HTTP_PORT=3001
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD=<admin_password>
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_USER=admin
    volumes:
      - ./grafana.ini:/etc/grafana/grafana.ini
      - ./dashboards:/var/lib/grafana/dashboards
    ports:
      - "3001:3000"
    restart: always

  grafana-secure:
    image: grafana/grafana
    user: "nonroot"
    environment:
      - GF_SERVER_HTTP_PORT=3002
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD=<admin_password>
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_USER=admin
    volumes:
      - ./grafana.ini:/etc/grafana/grafana.ini
      - ./dashboards:/var/lib/grafana/dashboards
    ports:
      - "3002:3000"
    restart: always

  grafana-secure-with-auth:
    image: grafana/grafana
    user: "nonroot"
    environment:
      - GF_SERVER_HTTP_PORT=3003
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD=<admin_password>
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_USER=admin
      - GF_AUTH_BASIC_ENABLED=true
    volumes:
      - ./grafana.ini:/etc/grafana/grafana.ini
      - ./dashboards:/var/lib/grafana/dashboards
    ports:
      - "3003:3000"
    restart: always

  grafana-secure-with-auth-and-allowlist:
    image: grafana/grafana
    user: "nonroot"
    environment:
      - GF_SERVER_HTTP_PORT=3004
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD=<admin_password>
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_USER=admin
      - GF_AUTH_BASIC_ENABLED=true
      - GF_AUTH_ALLOWLIST_USERS="user1,user2"
    volumes:
      - ./grafana.ini:/etc/grafana/grafana.ini
      - ./dashboards:/var/lib/grafana/dashboards
    ports:
      - "3004:3000"
    restart: always

  grafana-secure-with-auth-and-allowlist-and-validation:
    image: grafana/grafana
    user: "nonroot"
    environment:
      - GF_SERVER_HTTP_PORT=3005
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD=<admin_password>
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_USER=admin
      - GF_AUTH_BASIC_ENABLED=true
      - GF_AUTH_ALLOWLIST_USERS="user1,user2"
      - GF_VALIDATE_IP=true
    volumes:
      - ./grafana.ini:/etc/grafana/grafana.ini
      - ./dashboards:/var/lib/grafana/dashboards
    ports:
      - "3005:3000"
    restart: always

volumes:
  prometheus-data:
  grafana-data:
